summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Avantra Chemicals iteration 4 - inera.ag design implementation. All 25 backend API tests passed. All frontend features verified including full-screen hero slider, dark premium aesthetic, product category cards, stats with + suffix, technology section, and admin product form with Downloads tab.

issues: Download buttons (manual/leaflet) only appear when URLs are set. Most seeded products don't have manual_url or leaflet_url populated yet - this is expected behavior but admin should add URLs via Downloads tab.

critical_code_review_comments: Hero slider works correctly with fade transitions, navigation arrows, and pagination dots
Product category cards (2x2 grid) have black background and work as expected
Stats section displays numbers with + suffix (12K+, 50+, 15+, 10+)
Technology section has black background with 3 numbered cards (01, 02, 03)
Admin product form has 5 tabs: Basic, Composition, Details, Advantages, Downloads
Downloads tab correctly has manual_url and leaflet_url fields with placeholder text
seed_data_creation: Test data created during testing (gallery, blog, video, job, products) - cleaned up after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from review_request verified and working. Hero slider with 4 slides and auto-rotation. Product category cards (4 cards in 2x2 grid). Stats showing 12K+, 50+, 15+, 10+. Technology section with numbered cards. Admin Downloads tab for manual_url/leaflet_url. All navigation links working. Language switcher works (EN, TE, KN, HI).

homepage_hero_slider.details: Full-screen hero slider with 4 slides, auto-rotation every 5 seconds, navigation arrows (prev/next), and pagination dots. Fade transition between slides.

homepage_product_category_cards.details: 4 product category cards in 2x2 grid with black background. Categories: Biostimulants, Biofertilizers, Micronutrients, Liquid Fertilizers.

homepage_stats_section.details: Stats section showing: 12K+ Farmers Served, 50+ Authorized Dealers, 15+ Bio Products, 10+ States Covered. Green numbers with + suffix.

homepage_technology_section.details: Black background section with 3 numbered cards (01, 02, 03). Cards titled: 'Feed the plant when they need it', 'Protect plants from stressors', 'Make products last longer'.

products_page_filter_tabs.details: Products page has filter tabs: All, Biostimulants, Biofertilizers, Liquid Fertilizers, Micronutrients, Water Soluble. Clicking tabs updates URL and filters products.

products_page_grid.details: Products displayed in 4-column grid with product image, brand, name, category label, and description.

product_detail_hero.details: Dark green gradient hero section with product name, category badge, description, and product image.

product_detail_composition_table.details: Composition table with black header (Component, Specification columns) and alternating row colors.

product_detail_download_buttons.details: Download Manual and Download Leaflet buttons appear when manual_url/leaflet_url are set. Buttons styled with white background.

admin_login.details: Admin login with password 'avantra2024' works correctly. Shows success toast on login.

admin_product_form_tabs.details: Product form has 5 tabs: Basic, Composition, Details, Advantages, Downloads. All tabs accessible and functional.

admin_downloads_tab.details: Downloads tab contains Product Manual URL and Product Leaflet URL fields with placeholder text.

about_page.details: About page with dark hero header, mission section, stats, technology section (Phytocode), and values section.

contact_page.details: Contact page with dark hero, contact info section, and contact form (name, email, phone, message fields).

dealers_page.details: Dealers page with dark hero, dealer search, dealer list, and dealer application form.

gallery_page.details: Gallery page with dark hero and gallery grid with lightbox on click.

media_center_page.details: Media Center page with dark hero displaying blog posts.

careers_page.details: Careers page with dark hero, why join us section, and job listings.

navigation_links.details: All navbar links work: About, Products, Gallery, Media, Dealers, Contact.

language_switcher.details: Language switcher works with EN, TE, KN, HI options. Clicking options changes language.

footer.details: Footer displays with logo, description, quick links, product links, contact info, social icons, and legal links.
